raw_candidate_payload.rejection_reason: All five hard gates that require a confirmed exploit path fail simultaneously: live_state_supports_preconditions=false, unprivileged_attacker=false, attacker_controls_trigger=false, exact_code_path_or_selector_exists=false, concrete_fund_or_reward_gain=false, gain_is_beyond_entitlement=false. The upstream triage correctly classified this candidate as NEEDS_LIVE_CONTEXT, not NEEDS_LOCAL_PROOF or HIGH_CONFIDENCE_CANDIDATE. The proof gate receives only candidates that have already cleared live context; this candidate has not. No live context file was provided, verified_source is null, no selectors have been recovered, proxy state is unknown, deployer is unknown, and volume24h_usd is 0.0. The value-at-risk (~$10.9M) is real and the surface class (unknown_protocol + fresh_contract_large_balance + stablecoin_balance) is a legitimate priority, but value alone does not satisfy any hard gate. This candidate must be returned to the needs_live_context/ queue. It may be re-submitted to the proof gate only after all five live_preconditions above are resolved and at least one confirmed public value-moving selector with missing or bypassable access control is identified.
